description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was parallel-parked within the parking lane on northbound 19th Avenue in San Francisco, when a dump 
truck, traveling north in the adjacent lane, swiped the driver side mirror on the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. The
 operator of the dump truck did not stop and left the scene without exchanging information. There were no reported injuries and police were 
not called.
Print
Clear Form
